'''zanudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmograph|osmograph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmograph|osmograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zanudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zænidhith|zænidhith]] || [[word:zænidhij|zænidhij]] || [[word:zænidhish|zænidhish]] || [[word:zænidhi|zænidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanunudhuth|zanunudhuth]] || [[word:zanunudhuj|zanunudhuj]] || [[word:zanunudhush|zanunudhush]] || [[word:zanunudhu|zanunudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanudhuth|zanudhuth]] || [[word:zanudhuj|zanudhuj]] || [[word:zanudhush|zanudhush]] || [[word:zanudhu|zanudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanufdhuth|zanufdhuth]] || [[word:zanufdhuj|zanufdhuj]] || [[word:zanufdhush|zanufdhush]] || [[word:zanufdhuf|zanufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanudhuthu|zanudhuthu]] || [[word:zanudhuju|zanudhuju]] || [[word:zanudhushu|zanudhushu]] || [[word:zanudhuku|zanudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanudhuth|zanudhuth]] || [[word:zanudhuj|zanudhuj]] || [[word:zanudhush|zanudhush]] || [[word:zanudhu|zanudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanudhuthul|zanudhuthul]] || [[word:zanudhujul|zanudhujul]] || [[word:zanudhushul|zanudhushul]] || [[word:zanudhukul|zanudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanudhuthuthu|zanudhuthuthu]] || [[word:zanudhujuju|zanudhujuju]] || [[word:zanudhushushu|zanudhushushu]] || [[word:zanudhuku|zanudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanudhuthun|zanudhuthun]] || [[word:zanudhujun|zanudhujun]] || [[word:zanudhushun|zanudhushun]] || [[word:zanudhukun|zanudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanudhuthuoro|zanudhuthuoro]] || [[word:zanudhujuoro|zanudhujuoro]] || [[word:zanudhushuoro|zanudhushuoro]] || [[word:zanudhukuoro|zanudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
